differential_diagnoses: Viral hepatitis (A, B, C, or E)
next_steps: Order peripheral blood smear for Babesia species
Perform bronchoalveolar lavage for cytology, cultures, and PCR
Order viral hepatitis panel (HAV, HBV, HCV, HEV)
Send serum and urine for leptospirosis testing
Maintain hemodynamic support and monitor for renal replacement therapy
Order autoimmune workup including ANCA and ANA
Perform thoracic echocardiography to evaluate for cardiac involvement
